en.footer.intro: Nevada plumbing dispatch. Real trucks, real hours, a flat number before any wrench turns.
en.footer.bookNote: Dispatch confirms by phone in under five minutes.
en.seo.home.title: Conduitora - Nevada On-Call Plumbers, 24/7 Dispatch
en.seo.home.desc: Residential and commercial plumbing across Nevada. Real trucks, real hours, a flat number before any wrench turns.
en.seo.book.title: Book a Truck - Conduitora
en.seo.book.desc: Tell us what's leaking. Dispatch confirms in under five minutes.
en.hero.body: Residential and commercial plumbing across Nevada. Real trucks, real hours, a flat number before any wrench turns.
en.metrics.title: Numbers we don't pad.
en.metrics.body: No marketing math, no 'up to' caveats. Just what 4,182 service calls measured last year - pulled straight from dispatch, audited by our shop foreman.
en.services.notListBody: If your job isn't one of these six, we'll tell you who does it better.
en.svc.s1.title: Drain & Sewer Clearing
en.svc.s1.body: Hydro-jet and cable work for kitchen, lateral, and mainline blockages. Camera inspection on every mainline.
en.svc.s2.title: Leak Detection & Repair
en.svc.s2.body: Acoustic and thermal locating, slab and wall. We open the smallest possible cut, document with photos, and patch.
en.svc.s3.title: Water Heater Service
en.svc.s3.body: Tank, tankless, and hybrid. Replacement crews stocked from Reno to Henderson. Same-day install on most residential units.
en.svc.s4.title: Commercial Backflow
en.svc.s4.body: Certified testing, repair, and annual reports to the Southern Nevada Water Authority. Restaurants, clinics, warehouses.
en.svc.s5.title: Repipe & Rough-In
en.svc.s5.body: Whole-home and new-construction rough-ins. PEX-A, Type-L copper. Permitted, inspected, photographed at every stage.
en.svc.s6.title: Trenchless Sewer
en.svc.s6.body: Pipe bursting and CIPP lining when excavation isn't an option. Driveways, slabs, and HOA easements stay intact.
en.dispatch.title: Ninety minutes,
en.dispatch.body: A call into Conduitora doesn't go to a voicemail tree. It rings a desk in midtown Reno, where a licensed journeyman pages the nearest stocked truck. Here is the timeline, measured against 4,182 calls last year.
en.dispatch.s1.title: You call. A human picks up.
en.dispatch.s1.body: Dispatch is in Reno, staffed by licensed journeymen - never an answering service.
en.dispatch.s2.title: Job is logged, truck is paged.
en.dispatch.s2.body: Nearest crew to your ZIP gets a pre-stocked truck with the parts for your symptom.
en.dispatch.s3.title: We text a photo of your tech.
en.dispatch.s3.body: Name, badge, license number, ETA window. No unmarked vans.
en.dispatch.s4.title: Diagnosis, then a flat number.
en.dispatch.s4.body: Written estimate before any wrench turns. You sign, or we leave - no charge.
en.crew.body: Every truck has one licensed journeyman or master plumber - not 'a guy with the tools.' Below is the actual rotation, with badge numbers you can verify against the Nevada State Contractors Board.
en.crew.footnote: Verify any license at nscb.nv.gov · We'll tell you who's coming before they arrive.
en.crew.m1.name: Daryl Halverson
en.crew.m1.quote: If it's behind a wall, I've already met it twice.
en.crew.m2.name: Marisol Vega
en.crew.m2.quote: Tankless isn't magic. It's just measured math and a clean install.
en.crew.m3.name: Anthony Brooks
en.crew.m3.quote: Every clog tells you what the last plumber missed.
en.crew.m4.name: Sarah Engle
en.crew.m4.quote: I don't turn wrenches anymore. I send the right person to your door.
en.crew.m5.name: Wesley Okafor
en.crew.m5.quote: Out here, the nearest backup is two hours away. So the truck carries it.
en.crew.m6.name: Carla Reyes
en.crew.m6.quote: I leave the kitchen cleaner than I found it. Every time.
en.coverage.title: From the Strip
en.coverage.body: Crews are stationed in three hubs - Las Vegas, Reno, and Elko - so the truck coming to you isn't an hour of freeway away from your kitchen flood.
en.coverage.footnote: Outside Nevada? We refer. No charge.
en.coverage.pin1.label: Reno
en.coverage.pin2.label: Las Vegas
en.coverage.pin3.label: Elko
en.faq.title: Things people
en.faq.intro: Can't find what you're after? Call dispatch - a human picks up.
en.faq.q1: Are you licensed and bonded in Nevada?
en.faq.a1: Yes. NSCB License #0089421, Bond NV-BO-44218, $2M general liability. Verification page on request.
en.faq.a2: Standard hours: $0. After-hours (10 PM – 6 AM, holidays): $89, credited against the job if you book us.
en.faq.q3: Do you work with property managers?
en.faq.a3: Yes. Net-30 billing, single invoice per portfolio, dedicated dispatcher for properties of 40+ doors.
en.faq.q4: Will you tear up my yard for a sewer line?
en.faq.a4: Only if we have to. We default to trenchless on lines 20+ years old; full excavation is quoted separately.
en.book.title: Tell us what's leaking.
en.book.sub: Send the form. Dispatch confirms by phone in under five minutes, with a named tech and a window.

en.inquiry.field.name: Full name
en.inquiry.field.message: What's happening - when it started, any noises or smells.
